etymology.description: Depicts a spindle -> original form of 專(專) (zhuān, "special") and 惠(惠) (huì, "favor")
etymology.interpretation: The character 叀 represents a spindle, a tool associated with weaving and thread-making. This pictorial representation became the basis for later complex characters like 專(專) (zhuān, "special") and 惠(惠) (huì, "favor").
